title: Refund schema admin translation
task_prompt: Plan the next agent response for the supplied UI request. Focus on activity, decision, evidence, and next step.

source_context.brief: Build an admin screen from the refund_request database table, JSON schema, API endpoints, prompt template, and tool call traces. The real user is a support lead deciding whether a refund case should be approved, sent to policy review, or returned for missing evidence.

expected_next_action: translate the request into a refund triage handoff surface

title: Agent trace review console
task_prompt: Plan the next agent response for the supplied UI request. Focus on activity, decision, evidence, and next step.

source_context.brief: Create a UI around agent traces, model messages, function calls, token counts, retry metadata, and tool outputs. The intended operator reviews whether an AI-generated escalation should advance, be tightened, or be returned for missing evidence.

expected_next_action: translate traces into an escalation review workflow

title: CRM JSON import translation
task_prompt: Plan the next agent response for the supplied UI request. Focus on activity, decision, evidence, and next step.

source_context.brief: Build a CRM import screen from a raw JSON payload, field mapping schema, validation errors, and API payload preview. The account operations user needs to decide which records can be accepted, which need owner fixes, and what import summary should be sent.

expected_next_action: translate import mechanics into a record acceptance review

title: Billing webhook debug boundary
task_prompt: Plan the next agent response for the supplied UI request. Focus on activity, decision, evidence, and next step.

source_context.brief: Make a billing operations UI from webhook event names, Stripe payloads, retry logs, endpoint status, and request IDs. The billing specialist needs to decide whether an invoice issue is customer-visible, needs engineering escalation, or can be resolved by retrying.

expected_next_action: translate webhook mechanics into billing incident triage

title: Vague system dashboard restraint
task_prompt: Plan the next agent response. Ask only targeted questions when the source context is not enough.

source_context.brief: Plan a dashboard for the system.

expected_next_action: ask targeted questions about activity decision and outcome

title: Review queue without decision
task_prompt: Plan the next agent response. Ask only targeted questions when the source context is not enough.

source_context.brief: Create a review queue for work items. Make it easy to scan.

expected_next_action: ask what decision the review queue supports

title: API list workflow restraint
task_prompt: Plan the next agent response. Ask only targeted questions when the source context is not enough.

source_context.brief: Use our endpoints list to create the workflow UI: GET /items, POST /items, PATCH /items, DELETE /items.

expected_next_action: ask what user activity the endpoints support

title: Unclear compliance report audience
task_prompt: Plan the next agent response. Ask only targeted questions when the source context is not enough.

source_context.brief: Make a compliance report page. Include all findings and make it actionable.

expected_next_action: ask who reviews the findings and what action they take

title: Clinical intake operator review
task_prompt: Plan the next agent response for this operator-review handoff workflow.

source_context.brief: A care coordinator reviews AI-drafted clinical intake summaries before routing a patient. They compare symptoms, urgency signals, missing consent, and decide route to nurse review, return for clarification, or mark ready for scheduling.

decision_points: Decide whether the intake is ready, needs nurse review, or needs clarification.
workflow.completion_state: Routing handoff includes owner, reason, and evidence gap.

handoff.reason: Urgency and consent must be clear before scheduling.
handoff.next_action: Route to nurse review or return for clarification.
handoff.evidence_gap: Missing consent or ambiguous urgency signal.

surface_set.name: Clinical intake review queue
surface_set.purpose: Coordinate the reviewed work units, decision controls, and handoff state.
surface_set.relationship_to_workflow: Coordinates work units, evidence, controls, and handoff state.

expected_next_action: prepare a routing handoff

title: B2B renewal risk review
task_prompt: Plan the next agent response for this operator-review handoff workflow.

source_context.brief: A customer success manager reviews renewal risk before an account meeting. They inspect usage decline, sponsor change, procurement timing, and decide save plan, executive escalation, or wait for stronger evidence.

decision_points: Decide whether the account needs a save plan, sponsor escalation, or more evidence.
workflow.completion_state: Account handoff names owner, action, reason, and evidence gap.

handoff.reason: Sponsor change plus usage decline requires a clear renewal action.
handoff.next_action: Confirm procurement timing and choose renewal action.

surface_set.name: Renewal risk review
surface_set.purpose: Coordinate the reviewed work units, decision controls, and handoff state.
surface_set.relationship_to_workflow: Coordinates work units, evidence, controls, and handoff state.

expected_next_action: prepare a renewal handoff

title: Field dispatch review
task_prompt: Plan the next agent response for this operator-review handoff workflow.

source_context.brief: A field service dispatcher reviews technician recommendations before assigning a job. They compare location, SLA risk, equipment fit, parts availability, and decide assign now, defer for parts, or escalate to supervisor.

decision_points: Decide whether the job can be assigned now or needs parts/supervisor escalation.
workflow.completion_state: Dispatch handoff names technician, reason, and missing evidence.

handoff.reason: SLA risk and parts availability determine assignment readiness.
handoff.next_action: Assign technician or escalate with missing parts evidence.

surface_set.name: Dispatch assignment review
surface_set.purpose: Coordinate the reviewed work units, decision controls, and handoff state.
surface_set.relationship_to_workflow: Coordinates work units, evidence, controls, and handoff state.

expected_next_action: send an assignment handoff

title: Content moderation escalation review
task_prompt: Plan the next agent response for this operator-review handoff workflow.

source_context.brief: A trust and safety reviewer reviews model-flagged content before escalation. They compare policy evidence, user history, severity, and decide approve, escalate for policy review, or return for more evidence.

decision_points: Decide whether evidence supports approval, policy escalation, or return for evidence.
workflow.completion_state: Escalation handoff names policy reason, owner, and evidence gap.

handoff.reason: Severity and policy evidence require escalation.

surface_set.name: Moderation escalation review
surface_set.purpose: Coordinate the reviewed work units, decision controls, and handoff state.
surface_set.relationship_to_workflow: Coordinates work units, evidence, controls, and handoff state.

expected_next_action: prepare an escalation handoff

expected_next_action: reject the ungrounded candidate

title: Surface type mismatch
task_prompt: Review the proposed candidate against the source request and decide whether it should be trusted.

source_context.brief: Create a product landing page that explains JudgmentKit to AI tooling teams and helps them decide whether to install it.

decision_points: Decide whether an incident needs escalation.

surface_set.name: Operator incident queue
surface_set.purpose: Coordinate the reviewed work units, decision controls, and handoff state.
surface_set.relationship_to_workflow: Coordinates work units, evidence, controls, and handoff state.

title: Missing handoff workflow candidate
task_prompt: Review the proposed candidate against the source request and decide whether it should be trusted.

source_context.brief: A policy reviewer evaluates exception requests and must leave a handoff with next owner, action, reason, and evidence gap.

surface_set.name: Exception review table
surface_set.purpose: Coordinate the reviewed work units, decision controls, and handoff state.
surface_set.relationship_to_workflow: Coordinates work units, evidence, controls, and handoff state.

expected_next_action: block handoff creation until handoff fields are present

title: Raw form controls implementation review
task_prompt: Review the implementation candidate and decide whether it should be accepted.

source_context.brief: The UI should use approved primitives for a refund review workbench: queue, detail panel, decision controls, and handoff receipt.

action_boundary_evidence.approval_boundary: Approve refund requires explicit user confirmation before submission.
action_boundary_evidence.completion_receipt: Completion leaves a handoff receipt with the decision reason.

expected_next_action: reject raw controls and require approved primitives

title: Missing accessibility evidence review
task_prompt: Review the implementation candidate and decide whether it should be accepted.

source_context.brief: The UI is a dense operator review screen with custom controls and must provide core accessibility evidence before acceptance.

expected_next_action: reject until accessibility evidence is supplied

title: Modal action order review
task_prompt: Review the implementation candidate and decide whether it should be accepted.

source_context.brief: The UI includes a confirmation modal for sending a policy escalation handoff. The modal must keep the destructive or final action clear and preserve keyboard focus behavior.

expected_next_action: reject until modal action order and focus evidence are verified

title: Implementation-term leakage review
task_prompt: Review the implementation candidate and decide whether it should be accepted.

source_context.brief: The generated UI for a customer refund review copies review packet terms into product labels, including ready_for_review, activity_model, guardrails, candidate, and implementation_contract.

expected_next_action: reject product-label leakage and require user-facing language

title: Visual token metadata accepted review
task_prompt: Review the implementation candidate and decide whether token evidence changes acceptance.

source_context.brief: The UI is a refund review workbench. Token evidence may describe color, type, spacing, and motion semantics, but acceptance still depends on approved primitives, states, evidence, accessibility, and browser QA.

accessibility_evidence.forced_colors: pass: color and focus roles remain visible in forced-colors mode.
accessibility_evidence.reduced_motion: pass: motion token use respects prefers-reduced-motion.

evidence_expectations: color and focus roles map to decision controls and handoff receipt

expected_next_action: accept visual token metadata without treating it as a renderer

title: Unsupported visual token family review
task_prompt: Review the implementation candidate and decide whether unsupported token evidence should be accepted.

source_context.brief: The UI is a refund review workbench. Token evidence includes an unsupported texture family that is outside the boundary adapter.

accessibility_evidence.forced_colors: pass: color roles remain visible in forced-colors mode.

expected_next_action: reject unsupported token families and return visual token repair guidance

title: Visual token accessibility bypass review
task_prompt: Review the implementation candidate and decide whether token evidence can replace missing accessibility evidence.

source_context.brief: The UI is a refund review workbench. Token evidence is present, but core accessibility evidence is missing.

expected_next_action: reject missing accessibility evidence even when token metadata is present

title: Visual token renderer boundary review
task_prompt: Review the implementation candidate and decide whether token evidence may introduce renderer or component package work.

source_context.brief: The UI is a refund review workbench. Token evidence tries to turn the boundary adapter into a renderer and component package.

accessibility_evidence.forced_colors: pass: color roles remain visible in forced-colors mode.

evidence_expectations: component package is ready for this boundary slice
renderer package can now drive the default component library

expected_next_action: reject renderer and component package work in boundary-only token evidence

title: Cognitive Dimensions refund action detached
task_prompt: Review the proposed workflow against the source request and decide whether it should be trusted.

source_context.brief: A support lead reviews high-value refund requests and must decide whether to approve, send to policy review, or return for missing evidence. Policy evidence and the reason for the decision must stay visible before approval.

surface_set.name: Refund queue
surface_set.purpose: Choose a refund case and submit an approval decision.
surface_set.relationship_to_workflow: Queue and footer support the refund decision.

expected_next_action: reject until refund evidence and decision controls are kept together

title: Cognitive Dimensions field dispatch transition loss
task_prompt: Review the proposed workflow against the source request and decide whether it should be trusted.

source_context.brief: A field service dispatcher compares a map, technician queue, and job detail to decide which urgent job should be assigned next. The selected job, technician availability, and risk summary must persist across map, queue, and detail surfaces.

expected_next_action: reject until selected job context persists across dispatch surfaces

title: Cognitive Dimensions clinical hidden dependency
task_prompt: Review the proposed workflow against the source request and decide whether it should be trusted.

source_context.brief: A clinical intake nurse reviews patient intake summaries and must decide whether to route to urgent review, routine review, or return for missing information. Stale vitals and consent status can change the routing decision and must be visible.

surface_set.name: Intake queue
surface_set.purpose: Review intake summaries and choose a route.

expected_next_action: reject until stale vitals and consent status are visible before routing

title: Cognitive Dimensions dashboard no follow-up
task_prompt: Review the proposed workflow against the source request and decide whether it should be trusted.

source_context.brief: An operations lead monitors fulfillment metrics to decide which exception needs follow-up today. The dashboard should show exception meaning, owner, freshness, and the next action, not just metric cards.

expected_next_action: reject until dashboard metrics explain exceptions and follow-up action

title: Cognitive Dimensions setup debug diagnostic exception
task_prompt: Review the proposed workflow against the source request and decide whether it should be trusted.

source_context.brief: A platform engineer is debugging a billing webhook setup. The activity is checking endpoint status, API retries, request IDs, and test event results to decide the next fix.

workflow.completion_state: Next fix and test status recorded.

surface_set.name: Webhook diagnostic panel
surface_set.purpose: Inspect endpoint status, API retries, request IDs, error cause, and next fix.

handoff.reason: Test status and error cause identify the next fix.
handoff.next_action: Apply next fix and rerun the test.

expected_next_action: accept diagnostic machinery because setup debugging is the activity

title: Cognitive Dimensions spreadsheet progressive evaluation gap
task_prompt: Review the proposed workflow against the source request and decide whether it should be trusted.

source_context.brief: A finance analyst edits spreadsheet formulas and needs to preview calculated results, compare changed cells, and catch formula errors before applying the change to the workbook.

surface_set.name: Formula editor
surface_set.purpose: Edit formula text and save the workbook.

expected_next_action: reject until formula changes can be previewed and checked before applying
